title: phlomoides transoxana
intro: Phlomoides transoxana, also known as Phlomoides, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to Central Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides transoxana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions to extract its medicinal compounds.
